title: Django Segment 05
summary: Mid-development segment of the Django web framework (circa Django 3.x era). Covers significant ORM enhancements, database backend improvements, admin interface updates, view layer additions, PostgreSQL contrib features, HTTP handling improvements, and management command refinements. Includes work on JSONField, async view support, and cross-backend SQL improvements.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: Mid-development segment of the Django web framework (circa Django 3.x era). Covers significant ORM enhancements, database backend improvements, admin interface updates, view layer additions, PostgreSQL contrib features, HTTP handling improvements, and management command refinements. Includes work on JSONField, async view support, and cross-backend SQL improvements.

nodes.label: ORM Models Layer
nodes.description: The Django ORM including querysets, fields, expressions, constraints, indexes, and model options. PRs add JSONField support, improve constraint validation, fix queryset combination edge cases, and enhance expression compilation.

nodes.label: Admin Interface
nodes.description: The Django admin site including changelist, filters, actions, inlines, and autocomplete. PRs improve filter behavior, fix action handling, enhance autocomplete widgets, and improve admin display utilities.

nodes.label: Database Backends
nodes.description: Backend implementations for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and Oracle. PRs improve schema operations, fix introspection for new field types, and enhance backend-specific SQL compilation for JSON and array operations.

nodes.label: Views Framework
nodes.description: Class-based and function-based views including generic views, decorators, and debug views. PRs add async view support, improve generic view customization, and fix error handling in debug views.

nodes.label: Core Framework
nodes.description: Core components including validators, serializers, checks, cache, file handling, and signing. PRs fix validator patterns, improve file upload handling, and enhance cache backend behavior.

nodes.label: Utility Modules
nodes.description: Shared utilities including text, encoding, functional, crypto, and date handling. PRs improve text utilities, fix timezone edge cases, and add new helper functions.

nodes.label: Database Core
nodes.description: Core database layer including migrations, transaction management, and connection handling. PRs fix migration serialization, improve transaction behavior, and handle migration squashing edge cases.

nodes.label: HTTP Layer
nodes.description: HTTP request/response handling including cookies, streaming, file uploads, and content negotiation. PRs fix response headers, improve streaming response behavior, and handle edge cases in request parsing.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL Contrib
nodes.description: PostgreSQL-specific features including array fields, range fields, full-text search, and aggregates. PRs improve array operations and fix PostgreSQL-specific lookup behavior.

nodes.label: Management Commands
nodes.description: Management command infrastructure and built-in commands. PRs improve command output, fix argument parsing, and enhance migration commands.

nodes.label: GIS Framework
nodes.description: Geographic information system support with spatial backends and geometry fields. PRs fix spatial operations and improve GIS backend compatibility.

nodes.label: Forms Framework
nodes.description: Form classes, widgets, fields, and validation logic. PRs fix widget rendering, improve field choices handling, and enhance validation error messages.

nodes.label: Authentication System
nodes.description: User authentication, permissions, and auth views. PRs improve password handling, fix session behavior, and enhance auth backend flexibility.

nodes.label: Template Engine
nodes.description: Django template language with loaders, tags, filters, and context. PRs fix template tag edge cases and improve engine configuration.

nodes.label: Middleware
nodes.description: Request/response middleware including CSRF, security, and common middleware. PRs fix middleware behavior and improve async compatibility.

nodes.label: Other Contrib Modules
nodes.description: Additional contrib packages including sitemaps, syndication, messages, and humanize. PRs fix minor issues in these supporting apps.

edges.label: admin uses ORM for data access and display
admin uses forms for model editing
admin uses auth for permission checks
ORM compiles queries via backend SQL compilers
models use core DB layer for connections/migrations
postgres contrib adds custom model fields
views use utility decorators and helpers
auth models use ORM for user/permission storage
forms use utility functions for rendering
management commands interact with database layer
GIS extends database backends with spatial operations
core validators and checks use utility functions
